subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in Hobart | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-6973
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of poodle work in Hobart. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-6973. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: ops, coffee.
